headline: Rollins (NYSE:ROL) Posts Better-Than-Expected Sales In Q1 CY2026
summary: Pest control company Rollins (NYSE:ROL) reported Q1 CY2026 results beating Wall Street’s revenue expectations, with sales up 10.2% year on year to $906.4 million. Its non-GAAP profit of $0.24 per share was in line with analysts’ consensus estimates.

headline: ROLLINS, INC. ANNOUNCES REGULAR QUARTERLY CASH DIVIDEND
summary: Rollins, Inc. (NYSE: ROL), a premier global consumer and commercial services company, announced that the Board of Directors declared a regular quarterly cash dividend on its common stock of $0.1825 per share payable June 10, 2026 to shareholders of record at the close of business on May 11, 2026.
